title: indestructible Reference data packet
description: This is the indestructible reference data packet
body:
This is a reference template data pack for indestructible. You can find relevant tutorials on YouTube or Bilibili.
这是indestructible的参考用模板数据包，你可以在youtube或者bilibili找到相关的使用教程。

Of course, you can also choose not to unzip it and place the compressed package directly into your datapacks folder. This will modify the zombie actions. The template only modifies the action animations for zombies holding "sword", "fist", "axe", "hoe", "shovel", and "pickaxe". If equipped with other weapons, the zombies will lose their action animations.
当然你也可以不进行解压，将压缩包装进你的datapacks文件夹内，这将会修改你的僵尸动作，模板只修改了"sword","fist","axe", "hoe", "shovel","pickaxe"持有武器动作，装备除此之外的武器，僵尸就会失去动作。
